signup.registration-successful: Registration successful, confirm via email to login.
signup.password-dont-match: Confirmation password must be the same of password.

reset.email-not-found: No user associated with the inserted email was found.
reset.token-not-found: Invalid or expired token, please try again.
reset.email-sent: An email with a link was sent, click to reset password.
reset.success: Password changed, login with the new password.

ecommerce.product-not-found: The requested product was not found.
ecommerce.order-not-found: The requested order was not found

generic.error-unknown: Something went wrong with the request.
